expectations.text: Output contains all 6 rounds (Round 1 through Round 6)
Growth Strategist, Brand Guardian, and CMO personas all appear and are distinct
Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
Round 4 references specific mitigations from Round 3, not just repeating Round 2
expectations.evidence: Stress-tests attack pilot proposal, conversion assumptions, support costs from Round 3

expectations.text: Round 6 contains one of the 5 valid recommendations
A CEO Summary section exists that is standalone and uses business language
expectations.evidence: CEO Summary present, standalone, uses revenue/risk language

expectations.text: Metrics table present with all 8 metrics filled in
Budget impact section with original ask, revised ask, and expected ROI
expectations.evidence: Budget: $85K pilot, up from $0; full rollout $240K/year with ROI metrics

expectations.text: Round 5 includes fallback plans for surviving challenges
expectations.evidence: Kill criteria and fallback plans for each stress-test
